I loved my living room, but it was feeling kind of thrown together. I wanted to be really careful and intentional about my upholstered furniture so I got several samples from @interiodefine and weighted the options of textures, colors, and styles. I found two I just loved... and here they are. This is the Alexander roll arm sofa with classic caster feet, and the Caitlin sofa in a performance velvet skirted style. This fabric is so soft AND durable, and I love the traditional lines on this one. I customized the length, depth, cushions, and more about both of these. My discount code is SUZANNAH20 for 20% off your order and I’m sharing all the details of my orders of these on my blog this week. #InteriorDefinePartner

I loved my living room, but it was feeling kind of thrown together. I wanted to be really careful and intentional about my upholstered furniture so I got several samples from @interiodefine and weighted the options of textures, colors, and styles. I found two I just loved... and here they are. This is the Alexander roll arm sofa with classic caster feet, and the Caitlin sofa in a performance velvet skirted style. This fabric is so soft AND durable, and I love the traditional lines on this one. I customized the length, depth, cushions, and more about both of these. My discount code is SUZANNAH20 for 20% off your order and I’m sharing all the details of my orders of these on my blog this week. #InteriorDefinePartner

body:
I loved my living room, but it was feeling kind of thrown together. I wanted to be really careful and intentional about my upholstered furniture so I got several samples from @interiodefine and weighted the options of textures, colors, and styles. I found two I just loved... and here they are. This is the Alexander roll arm sofa with classic caster feet, and the Caitlin sofa in a performance velvet skirted style. This fabric is so soft AND durable, and I love the traditional lines on this one. I customized the length, depth, cushions, and more about both of these. My discount code is SUZANNAH20 for 20% off your order and I’m sharing all the details of my orders of these on my blog this week. #InteriorDefinePartner
